stem: The amount of Marco's bill for a meal was $85. Marco gave a tip of 18% of the amount of the bill. What is the amount, in dollars, of the tip Marco gave?
rationale: The correct answer is 15.3. A tip of 18% of $85 equals 0.18 × 85 = $15.30. Therefore, the tip Marco gave is $15.30 (which can be entered as 15.3).
